productDisplayName: Wills Lifestyle Men Stripes Grey Shirt
description: Style note Classic Wills shirt made of pure cotton, crafted with the label's best yarn. Keep your workwear composition original with this striped staple. Wear it with formal trousers, brogues and an understated belt. Product Details Grey and pink striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, full buttoned placket and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Size and Fit Slim Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
